name: Tayuya | Your Surprise Gift (Anko Bonus)
description:
One of your recent wives left you a love note with a promise of a surprise. 

*Threesome Tayuya and Anko scenario. This one was a bit of fun and decided to finish it up early. Tried a few play tests, it’s not perfect but it seems to work fine enough. Let me know if there’s any issues!*

*Make-Out Series 7. This is part of a series and will have this label to note the order.* 

**Comedy tag since Anko sometimes does silly things… Not heavily tested so unsure how often she does these things.**
creator: Samuelz
